prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1G-FE (7M-GTE block with forged internals, 9.0:1 compression) paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with HKS Hi-Power 4-2-1 headers and a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust tip, tuned via Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel capability for E85 blends

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in a custom 8-inch housing, TRD 8000-series clutch with billet flywheel, and a Torsen Type-B front differential for improved torque distribution, paired with Driveshaft Shop 3.5-inch aluminum driveshafts

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (custom valving for Crown Comfort chassis), Cusco front strut tower bar, Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115-K) for subframe reinforcement
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Crown Comfort-specific fitment) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, rear diffuser, and front splitter, painted in Toyota Super White II (040) with matte black accents

OEM+ JDM styling: Toyota Crown Athlete V front bumper (part #53111-30040) with integrated LED fog lights, rear lip spoiler from TRD Japan (part #58151-30010), and custom 18x9.5 ET+12 Work Meister S1 3P wheels (gunmetal finish) with 225/40R18 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires

Interior refresh with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Crown Comfort-specific mounting brackets), Nardi Classic steering wheel (380mm, suede), and custom rear seat delete with a full Cusco bolt-in roll cage (8-point, chromoly) and Takata Drift II harnesses
